face_exercises.name: Chin Lift
face_exercises.description: Tilt your head back and look at the ceiling. Push your lower jaw forward to feel a stretch under the chin. Hold for 10 seconds.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Tilt your head back slowly. Push your lower jaw forward. Hold for 10 seconds.

face_exercises.name: Fish Face
face_exercises.description: Suck in your cheeks and lips to make a fish face. Try to smile while holding this position. Hold for 10 seconds.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Suck in your cheeks and lips. Try to smile. Hold for 10 seconds.

face_exercises.name: Jaw Open Close
face_exercises.description: Open your mouth as wide as possible, then close it slowly. Repeat the movement in a controlled manner.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Open your mouth wide. Close it slowly. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Tongue Suction (Mewing)
face_exercises.description: Press your entire tongue flat against the roof of your mouth. Hold this position while breathing through your nose.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Press your tongue flat against the roof of your mouth. Hold and breathe through your nose.

face_exercises.name: Jaw Resistance
face_exercises.description: Place your fist under your chin. Push down with your jaw against the resistance of your fist. Hold for 10 seconds.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Place your fist under your chin. Push down against the resistance. Hold for 10 seconds.

face_exercises.name: Cheek Lift
face_exercises.description: Smile as wide as you can and press your fingertips on the top of your cheeks. Lift the cheeks toward your eyes. Hold for 10 seconds.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Smile wide. Press fingertips on cheeks. Lift toward eyes. Hold.

face_exercises.name: Neck Raise
face_exercises.description: Lie face down. Slowly lift your head and neck off the ground. Hold for 5 seconds, then lower slowly.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Lie face down. Lift your head and neck slowly. Hold for 5 seconds.

face_exercises.name: Eye Widening
face_exercises.description: Open your eyes as wide as possible without wrinkling your forehead. Hold for 10 seconds, then relax.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Open your eyes wide without wrinkling your forehead. Hold for 10 seconds.

body_exercises.name: Squats
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body as if sitting in a chair. Keep your back straight and knees over toes.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower down as if sitting. Keep your back straight.

body_exercises.name: Pushups
body_exercises.description: Start in plank position. Lower your body until chest nearly touches the floor. Push back up to starting position.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Start in plank position. Lower your chest to the floor. Push back up.

body_exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet together and arms at sides. Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead. Return to start.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Jump and spread your legs while raising arms overhead. Jump back to start.

body_exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
body_exercises.description: Start in plank position. Drive one knee toward your chest, then switch legs quickly in a running motion.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Get in plank position. Drive knees toward your chest alternately. Keep the pace.

body_exercises.name: Plank
body_exercises.description: Hold a push-up position with arms straight. Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels. Engage your core.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Get into push-up position. Keep your body straight. Engage your core. Hold.

body_exercises.name: High Knees
body_exercises.description: Stand in place and run, bringing your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms for momentum.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Run in place. Bring your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms.

body_exercises.name: Burpees
body_exercises.description: From standing, drop into a squat with hands on the floor. Jump feet back to plank. Do a push-up. Jump feet forward. Jump up with arms overhead.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Drop to squat. Jump to plank. Push-up. Jump forward. Jump up with arms high.

body_exercises.name: Wall Sit
body_exercises.description: Lean against a wall with knees at 90 degrees as if sitting in an invisible chair. Hold the position.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Lean against the wall. Slide down until knees are at 90 degrees. Hold the position.
